auth: engagement-surface (Authorization + IDToken) — same token set as workbench-api and WPM

list_groups.response: array of group objects with financialGroupId, name, number
list_groups.notes: Resolve a section name/number -> financialGroupId (e.g. '2000' -> Payables -> its financialGroupId)

get_leadsheet.fires_on: page load when a system-generated leadsheet opens

account.id: integer — referenceId for all annotation calls
account.name: string

response_shape.comments: string — current comment-box text ('' if none)

notes: account.id (referenceId) is a CCH-internal integer — NOT the account number string
Account number uses a 5-digit prefix: '20000-300', not '2000-300' — match exactly
e.g. account '20000-200' resolves to its own CCH-internal referenceId, distinct from the account-number string
